title: Exit trigger
description: A pre-committed, checkable condition that updates or closes a hypothesis. Every trigger must name a data_source you can actually check; an admission rejects any trigger you cannot verify.

id.description: Stable identifier for the trigger, e.g. 'supply_easing'.

metric.description: The observable being watched, e.g. 'lead times normalize'.

op.description: Relation that fires the trigger, e.g. '>', '<', 'reverses'.

data_source.description: Where the metric is checked; must be a verifiable tier.
